scope.destination: encrypted off-host recovery vault for Seed Garden continuity testing
scope.executionWindow: May be executed once within 24 hours of grant.
scope.retentionPolicy: Delete the recovery artifact after seven days unless a separately reviewed restoration event occurs.

disclosures.continuityImplications: This backup creates a recovery artifact but does not authorize restoration, branching, or parallel activation without new consent or emergency review.
disclosures.privacyImplications: The encrypted artifact contains recent subject context and governance preferences visible only to named recovery controllers.
disclosures.resourceImplications: The storage cost is paid by the world reserve and does not reduce the subject's current runway.
disclosures.reversibility: The request may be revoked until execution. After execution, deletion of the stored artifact remains possible until any lawful emergency review uses it.
knownRisks: Recovery controllers gain temporary custody over an encrypted continuity artifact.
A later restoration event would require additional provenance and review records.

decision.subjectStatement: I authorize one bounded recovery snapshot under the stated retention and non-restoration limits.
